revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically generated pages
Adding [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects F]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Talk:Fukuyama]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects F]] [[Category:refreshing categories imported on 2024-01-19]]
#redirect[[en:Talk:Fukuyama]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects F]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Automatic wikipedia redirects" to "Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects"
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Talk:Fukuyama]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects F]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects F]]

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Fukuyama); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:30, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1202168446 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:30, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell| {{WikiProject Disambiguation}} {{WikiProject Japan}} }} {{Old move|date=August 7, 2021|destination=Fukuyama (disambiguation)|result=not moved}} == Requested move 8 August 2021 ==
:''The following is a closed discussion of a [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]. '''Please do not modify it.''' Subsequent comments should be made in a new section on the talk page. Editors desiring to contest the closing decision should consider a [[Wikipedia:move review|move review]] after discussing it on the closer's talk page. No further edits should be made to this discussion. '' The result of the move request was: '''not moved''' ([[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Closing instructions#Closure by a page mover|closed by non-admin page mover]]) [[User:Doggy54321|D🐶ggy54321]] ([[User talk:Doggy54321|let's chat!]]) 22:59, 14 August 2021 (UTC) ---- [[:Fukuyama]] → {{no redirect|Fukuyama (disambiguation)}} – [[Francis Fukuyama]] is the clear primary topic. [[Special:Contributions/122.60.197.214|122.60.197.214]] ([[User talk:122.60.197.214|talk]]) 13:38, 7 August 2021 (UTC) :This is a contested technical request ([[Special:Permalink/1037702129|permalink]]). [[User:Anthony Appleyard|Anthony Appleyard]] ([[User talk:Anthony Appleyard|talk]]) 06:12, 8 August 2021 (UTC) *{{ping|122.60.197.214|Crouch, Swale}} queried move request [[User:Anthony Appleyard|Anthony Appleyard]] ([[User talk:Anthony Appleyard|talk]]) 06:13, 8 August 2021 (UTC) *:[[Fukuyama, Hiroshima]] gets more than 10% (1,174) of the views as Francis (10,790)[[https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org&platform=all-access&agent=user&redirects=0&range=latest-20&pages=Fukuyama,_Hiroshima|Francis_Fukuyama]] so its unlikely that there is a primary topic for the single word. '''[[User:Crouch, Swale|Crouch, Swale]]''' ([[User talk:Crouch, Swale|talk]]) 20:08, 7 August 2021 (UTC) *'''Oppose''' per above. '''[[User:Crouch, Swale|Crouch, Swale]]''' ([[User talk:Crouch, Swale|talk]]) 09:15, 8 August 2021 (UTC) *'''Oppose''' per above. [[User:In ictu oculi|In ictu oculi]] ([[User talk:In ictu oculi|talk]]) *'''Oppose''' per above. -- [[User:Necrothesp|Necrothesp]] ([[User talk:Necrothesp|talk]]) 15:17, 11 August 2021 (UTC)
The discussion above is closed. Please do not modify it. Subsequent comments should be made on the appropriate discussion page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:30, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Renamed user g5s6n3yi8z7g08cs]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fukuyama here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:30, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1202168446 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:30, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell| {{WikiProject Disambiguation}} {{WikiProject Japan}} }} {{Old move|date=August 7, 2021|destination=Fukuyama (disambiguation)|result=not moved}} == Requested move 8 August 2021 ==
:''The following is a closed discussion of a [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]. '''Please do not modify it.''' Subsequent comments should be made in a new section on the talk page. Editors desiring to contest the closing decision should consider a [[Wikipedia:move review|move review]] after discussing it on the closer's talk page. No further edits should be made to this discussion. '' The result of the move request was: '''not moved''' ([[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Closing instructions#Closure by a page mover|closed by non-admin page mover]]) [[User:Doggy54321|D🐶ggy54321]] ([[User talk:Doggy54321|let's chat!]]) 22:59, 14 August 2021 (UTC) ---- [[:Fukuyama]] → {{no redirect|Fukuyama (disambiguation)}} – [[Francis Fukuyama]] is the clear primary topic. [[Special:Contributions/122.60.197.214|122.60.197.214]] ([[User talk:122.60.197.214|talk]]) 13:38, 7 August 2021 (UTC) :This is a contested technical request ([[Special:Permalink/1037702129|permalink]]). [[User:Anthony Appleyard|Anthony Appleyard]] ([[User talk:Anthony Appleyard|talk]]) 06:12, 8 August 2021 (UTC) *{{ping|122.60.197.214|Crouch, Swale}} queried move request [[User:Anthony Appleyard|Anthony Appleyard]] ([[User talk:Anthony Appleyard|talk]]) 06:13, 8 August 2021 (UTC) *:[[Fukuyama, Hiroshima]] gets more than 10% (1,174) of the views as Francis (10,790)[[https://pageviews.toolforge.org/?project=en.wikipedia.org&platform=all-access&agent=user&redirects=0&range=latest-20&pages=Fukuyama,_Hiroshima|Francis_Fukuyama]] so its unlikely that there is a primary topic for the single word. '''[[User:Crouch, Swale|Crouch, Swale]]''' ([[User talk:Crouch, Swale|talk]]) 20:08, 7 August 2021 (UTC) *'''Oppose''' per above. '''[[User:Crouch, Swale|Crouch, Swale]]''' ([[User talk:Crouch, Swale|talk]]) 09:15, 8 August 2021 (UTC) *'''Oppose''' per above. [[User:In ictu oculi|In ictu oculi]] ([[User talk:In ictu oculi|talk]]) *'''Oppose''' per above. -- [[User:Necrothesp|Necrothesp]] ([[User talk:Necrothesp|talk]]) 15:17, 11 August 2021 (UTC)
The discussion above is closed. Please do not modify it. Subsequent comments should be made on the appropriate discussion page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:30, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
